channel.title: metrics on HCM
channel.description: Recent content in metrics on HCM

item.title: Measure, Statsd and Graphite
item.description: 今天给UXIN内部做了graphite的分享，PPT也是网上资料拼凑的，分享下: Measure, Statsd and Graphite

item.title: 使用graphite做指标统计和绘图
item.description: 基础知识 https://graphite.readthedocs.org/en/latest/ graphite doc http://graphite.wikidot.com/ outdated http://graphite.wikidot.com/high-level-diagram high-level-diagram(outdated) http://www.aosabook.org/en/graphite.html The Architecture of Open Source Applications 代码库 https://github.com/graphite-project https://github.com/bitly/statsdaemon statsd implemented in Go 使用graphite的项目 League Of Legends http://highscalability.com/blog/2014/10/13/how-league-of-legends-scaled-chat-to-70-million-players-it-t.html hipchat http://highscalability.com/blog/2014/1/6/how-hipchat-stores-and-indexes-billions-of-messages-using-el.html 其他资料 Measure it, Don’t Just Monitor It http://bryanwb.github.io/monitoring-measurement-preso A quick look at Graphite and StatsDhttp://www.slideshare.net/adrianmoisey1/graphite-14761751
